cenas.dalle_prompt: A dynamic montage of short clips from the week's training: a dog looking up at its name, making eye contact, running when called, all in quick succession, high energy and positive, cinematic quality, 8k detail
cenas.grok_movement: Fast-paced cuts and energetic transitions between the different learned behaviors, creating a summary of the week's progress

cenas.dalle_prompt: A checklist infographic with the week's lessons: 'Poder do Nome', 'Contato Visual', 'Marcador Sim!', 'Comando Vem'. Each item gets a satisfying green checkmark next to it, 8k detail
cenas.grok_movement: Each checkmark animates in with a satisfying 'ding' sound effect, confirming the completion of each lesson

cenas.dalle_prompt: A person and their dog playing tug-of-war with a rope toy in a sunny living room, both having a great time, celebrating the end of a successful week of training, cinematic quality, 8k detail
cenas.grok_movement: Dynamic, playful camera movement that captures the fun and energy of the game

cenas.dalle_prompt: Close-up on a calendar showing Week 1 being circled and a star sticker placed on it, symbolizing accomplishment, 8k detail
cenas.grok_movement: The circle and star animate onto the calendar, giving a sense of achievement and progression

cenas.dalle_prompt: Final screen with text 'Parabéns! Você completou a Semana 1!', with a preview of next week's topic 'Próxima Semana: Primeiros Comandos', encouraging and forward-looking, 8k quality
cenas.grok_movement: Confetti and celebration graphics animate in the background as the text appears, building excitement for the next module
